title: AEO agency offer draft — $45/mo website-AI-visibility ops
html:
Yahir's first written-out offer for the aeo agency: pitch local businesses on "general AI-wrld internet visibility," prove the gap with aeochecker.ai, book a quick call, then revamp the website using AI (mobile-first, structured), and charge $45/mo to host + keep it AI-search-optimized. Cold-outreach style — "spam send niche fixes" to surface himself.

TL;DR

  • aeo agency productized as $45/mo recurring website-host + AEO maintenance with a one-shot AI-rebuild upfront.
  • Lead-discovery tool of choice: aeochecker ai — used to surface visibility gaps the prospect can see in their own report.
  • This is the September-2025 seed of what later becomes the Insight AI funnel and the Peekaboo style visibility-dashboard pricing in October — same thesis, different packaging.

aeo agency · ai search optimization · aeochecker ai · the austin thesis · yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026
